_comment: ComfyUI API-format graph for Wan 2.2 TI2V-5B (native Wan nodes, no custom wrapper). The 5B model does BOTH text->video (omit node 50 + the start_image input) and image->video (include node 50 LoadImage + set inputs.start_image of node 55 to ["50", 0]). Replace <<tokens>>; numeric tokens MUST be real JSON numbers. The 5B uses wan2.2_vae. fps default 24. frames must be 4n+1 (5,9,...121). This is the smaller/faster fallback path; the operator's DEFAULT is the A14B graph (video-wan22-14b.api.json).
_t2v_vs_i2v: For i2v: add  "50": { "class_type": "LoadImage", "inputs": { "image": "<<uploaded_input_name>>" } }  AND add  "start_image": ["50", 0]  into node 55's inputs. For t2v: omit node 50 and the start_image input entirely.
